prompt: What is the total revenue generated by each product class in 2021? Rank them from highest to lowest.
answer: In 2021, the total revenue generated by each product class, ranked from highest to lowest, is as follows: Product Class 24425 generated $271,779.62, followed by Product Class 22975 with $233,458.53, and Product Class 22900 with $191,291.25. The remaining product classes generated lower revenues, with the lowest being Product Class 22950 at $21,576.88.

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd

x_data = data_df[config['x_axis']]
y_data = data_df[config['y_axis']]

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.bar(x_data, y_data)
plt.xlabel(config['x_axis'])
plt.ylabel(config['y_axis'])
plt.title(config['title'])

# Check for potential overlap
if len(x_data) > 10 or any(x_data.str.len() > 10):
    plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
visualization_goal: Bar chart showing total revenue by product class in 2021, sorted descending. Single metric on Y-axis: total revenue. X-axis: product class code.

chart_config.title: Total Revenue by Product Class in 2021

sql_query:
SELECT Product_Class_Code, SUM(Total_Sale_Value) AS Total_Revenue 
FROM sales 
WHERE CAST(Sold_Date AS VARCHAR) LIKE '2021-%' 
GROUP BY Product_Class_Code 
ORDER BY Total_Revenue DESC;
